RS-1.notes: Single-family detached only. Historic district limits may apply. Ch. 142.

TH.notes: Attached townhome development. See Sec. 142 townhome provisions.

RM-1.notes: Historic districts: 40 ft / 4 stories. Collins Ave 76–79th St: FAR 1.4. Waterfront: 50 ft from bulkhead. Sec. 142-155.

RM-2.notes: Historic districts: 50 ft / 5 stories. Indian Creek / Collins 26–44th: 75 ft. Alton Rd / Arthur Godfrey–34th: 85 ft. Bay lots: 100–140 ft. Sec. 142-217.

RM-3.notes: Max FAR 5.75 with all bonuses. Max height 330 ft with bonus. Highly subarea-specific — verify per parcel. Sec. 142-246.

RM-PRD.notes: Standards set by approved planned development agreement. Sec. 142-185.

RM-PRD-2.notes: Standards set by approved planned development agreement.

RPS-1.notes: South of Fifth Street area. Performance standard — site plan review required. Sec. 142-698.

RPS-2.notes: South of Fifth Street area. Performance standard — site plan review required.

RPS-3.notes: South of Fifth Street area. Includes Ocean Drive frontage parcels. Performance standard — site plan review required.

RPS-4.notes: South of Fifth Street area. Highest density residential performance standard. Verify height per parcel.

RO.notes: Mixed residential and office. FAR may increase to RM-2 levels when >25% residential. Sec. 142-575.

CD-2.notes: City-serving commercial. Residential component may qualify for RM-2 FAR range. Sec. 142-306.

CPS-1.notes: Washington Ave and commercial corridors. Site plan review required. Sec. 142-698.

CPS-2.notes: Commercial performance standard. Site plan review required.

MXE.notes: Ocean Dr / Collins Ave entertainment corridor. Historic district height controls apply (typically 45 ft). Retail, restaurant, hotel, residential. Sec. 142-545.

I-1.notes: Light industrial, warehousing, marine industry. Sec. 142-486.

TC-1.notes: Max 125 ft / 12 stories per Ord. 4124. Mixed use: residential, retail, office, hotel. Sec. 142-737.

TC-2.notes: North Beach Town Center General. Sec. 142-737.

TC-3.description: North Beach town center, residential office
TC-3.notes: Max 45 ft / 4 stories. Waterfront lots: additional setback requirements. Sec. 142-737.

GU.notes: Government, civic, and institutional uses. Parks, public buildings, city facilities.

CCC.notes: Miami Beach Convention Center campus. Standards specific to approved CCC plan. Sec. 142-365.

HD.notes: Mount Sinai Medical Center campus. Hospital and medical uses only.

MR.notes: Marinas, boat storage, water-related commercial. Sec. 142-515.

GC.notes: Normandy Shores Golf Course. Open space and golf use only.

WD-1.notes: Water lots only. No upland development. Sec. 142-635.

WD-2.notes: Water lots only. No upland development. Sec. 142-665.
